prompt:
A vertical 3:4 ultra-minimal luxury design poster showing conceptual evolution of a perfume bottle inspired by fluid diffusion. Top half: a seamless horizontal sequence of 5 refined sketch panels on a clean white background — (1) ink diffusion in water forming organic plumes, (2) plume expansion with layered fluid motion, (3) soft flowing envelope curves, (4) glass contour emerging around the flow, (5) clean line drawing of a perfume bottle. No borders, continuous transition, small grey labels: DIFFUSION / PLUME EXPANSION / SOFT ENVELOPES / GLASS CONTOUR / BOTTLE. Top-left serif title: ‘ESSENCE TO FORM’ with subtitle ‘INSPIRED BY FLUID MOVEMENT.’
Bottom half: a photorealistic luxury perfume bottle in a natural front 3/4 angle, transparent glass with soft golden liquid, subtle swirling fluid pattern inside, rounded square bottle with thick glass edges and a glossy black cap with gold neck ring. Dark cinematic background with soft smoke-like light rays, matte surface with gentle reflection. Warm studio lighting with golden highlights and soft shadows. Bottom-left branding: minimal fluid swirl logo, elegant serif text ‘VELURA’, small caps ‘EAU DE PARFUM’, tagline ‘INSPIRED BY FLUID MOVEMENT. MADE TO BE REMEMBERED.’ Ultra-minimal, premium editorial, highly detailed, cinematic lighting.
